de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.label

Class FormulaTermLabelRefactoring

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.label.FormulaTermLabelRefactoring
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    RuleSpecificTask, TermLabelRefactoring

    public class FormulaTermLabelRefactoring
extends Object
implements TermLabelRefactoring
    The TermLabelRefactoring used to label predicates with a FormulaTermLabel on applied loop invariants or operation contracts.
    Author:
    Martin Hentschel

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.label.TermLabelRefactoring

        TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope

    • Field Summary

      Fields 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private static String INNER_MOST_PARENT_REFACTORED_PREFIX
      Key prefix used in TermLabelState to store that the inner most label was already refactored on a given Goal.
      private static String PARENT_REFACTORING_REQUIRED
      Key used in TermLabelState by the FormulaTermLabelUpdate to indicate that a refactoring of parents (RefactoringScope#APPLICATION_CHILDREN_AND_GRANDCHILDREN_SUBTREE_AND_PARENTS) is required performed by refactorInCaseOfNewIdRequired(TermLabelState, Goal, Term, Services, List).
      private static String SEQUENT_FORMULA_REFACTORING_REQUIRED
      Key used in TermLabelState by the FormulaTermLabelUpdate to indicate that a refactoring of specified SequentFormulas (RefactoringScope#SEQUENT) is required performed by refactorSequentFormulas(TermLabelState, Services, Term, List).
      private static String UPDATE_REFACTORING_REQUIRED
      Key used in TermLabelState by the StayOnOperatorTermLabelPolicy to indicate that a refactoring below an update (RefactoringScope#APPLICATION_BELOW_UPDATES) is required performed by refactorBewlowUpdates(PosInOccurrence, Term, List).

      This method is used to refactor the labels of the given Term.

    • Field Detail

      • INNER_MOST_PARENT_REFACTORED_PREFIX

        private static final String INNER_MOST_PARENT_REFACTORED_PREFIX
        Key prefix used in TermLabelState to store that the inner most label was already refactored on a given Goal.
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • UPDATE_REFACTORING_REQUIRED

        private static final String UPDATE_REFACTORING_REQUIRED
        Key used in TermLabelState by the StayOnOperatorTermLabelPolicy to indicate that a refactoring below an update (RefactoringScope#APPLICATION_BELOW_UPDATES) is required performed by refactorBewlowUpdates(PosInOccurrence, Term, List).

        This is for instance required for the following rules:

        • concrete_and_1
        • concrete_and_2
        • concrete_and_3
        • concrete_and_4
        • concrete_eq_1
        • concrete_eq_2
        • concrete_eq_3
        • concrete_eq_4
        • concrete_impl_1
        • concrete_impl_2
        • concrete_impl_3
        • concrete_impl_4
        • concrete_not_1
        • concrete_not_2
        • concrete_or_1
        • concrete_or_2
        • concrete_or_3
        • concrete_or_4
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • PARENT_REFACTORING_REQUIRED

        private static final String PARENT_REFACTORING_REQUIRED
        Key used in TermLabelState by the FormulaTermLabelUpdate to indicate that a refactoring of parents (RefactoringScope#APPLICATION_CHILDREN_AND_GRANDCHILDREN_SUBTREE_AND_PARENTS) is required performed by refactorInCaseOfNewIdRequired(TermLabelState, Goal, Term, Services, List).

        This is for instance required if a rule is applied on a sub term without a FormulaTermLabel of a parent which has a FormulaTermLabel. Example rules are:

        • ifthenelse_split
        • arrayLengthNotNegative
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

      • SEQUENT_FORMULA_REFACTORING_REQUIRED

        private static final String SEQUENT_FORMULA_REFACTORING_REQUIRED
        Key used in TermLabelState by the FormulaTermLabelUpdate to indicate that a refactoring of specified SequentFormulas (RefactoringScope#SEQUENT) is required performed by refactorSequentFormulas(TermLabelState, Services, Term, List).

        This is for instance required if the assumes clause of a rule has a FormulaTermLabel but the application does not have it. Example rules are:

        • inEqSimp_contradInEq1
        See Also:
        Constant Field Values

    • Constructor Detail

      • FormulaTermLabelRefactoring

        public FormulaTermLabelRefactoring()

    • Method Detail

      • getSupportedRuleNames

        public ImmutableList<Name> getSupportedRuleNames()
        Returns the supported rule Names or null or an empty list if all rules are supported.
        Specified by:
        getSupportedRuleNames in interface RuleSpecificTask
        Returns:
        The list of supported rule Names or null/empty list if all rules are supported.

      • defineRefactoringScope

        public TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope defineRefactoringScope(TermLabelState state,
                                                           Services services,
                                                           PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence,
                                                           Term applicationTerm,
                                                           Rule rule,
                                                           Goal goal,
                                                           Object hint,
                                                           Term tacletTerm)
        Defines if a refactoring is required and if so in which TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope.
        Specified by:
        defineRefactoringScope in interface TermLabelRefactoring
        Parameters:
        state - The TermLabelState of the current rule application.
        services - The Services used by the Proof on which a Rule is applied right now.
        applicationPosInOccurrence - The PosInOccurrence in the previous Sequent which defines the Term that is rewritten.
        applicationTerm - The Term defined by the PosInOccurrence in the previous Sequent.
        rule - The Rule which is applied.
        goal - The optional Goal on which the Term to create will be used.
        hint - An optional hint passed from the active rule to describe the term which should be created.
        tacletTerm - The optional taclet Term.
        Returns:
        The required TermLabelRefactoring.RefactoringScope.

      • shouldRefactorSpecificationApplication

        protected boolean shouldRefactorSpecificationApplication(Rule rule,
                                             Goal goal,
                                             Object hint)
        Checks if the given hint requires a refactoring.
        Parameters:
        rule - The applied Rule.
        goal - The Goal.
        hint - The hint to check.
        Returns:
        true perform refactoring, false do not perform refactoring.

      • refactoreLabels

        public void refactoreLabels(TermLabelState state,
                   Services services,
                   PosInOccurrence applicationPosInOccurrence,
                   Term applicationTerm,
                   Rule rule,
                   Goal goal,
                   Object hint,
                   Term tacletTerm,
                   Term term,
                   List<TermLabel> labels)
        This method is used to refactor the labels of the given Term.
        Specified by:
        refactoreLabels in interface TermLabelRefactoring
        Parameters:
        state - The TermLabelState of the current rule application.
        services - The Services used by the Proof on which a Rule is applied right now.
        applicationPosInOccurrence - The PosInOccurrence in the previous Sequent which defines the Term that is rewritten.
        applicationTerm - The Term defined by the PosInOccurrence in the previous Sequent.
        rule - The Rule which is applied.
        goal - The optional Goal on which the Term to create will be used.
        hint - An optional hint passed from the active rule to describe the term which should be created.
        tacletTerm - The optional taclet Term.
        term - The Term which is now refactored.
        labels - The new labels the Term will have after the refactoring.

      • refactorSpecificationApplication

        protected void refactorSpecificationApplication(Term term,
                                    Goal goal,
                                    Services services,
                                    List<TermLabel> labels)
        Refactors a specification application.
        Parameters:
        term - The Term which is now refactored.
        goal - The optional Goal on which the Term to create will be used.
        services - The Services used by the Proof on which a Rule is applied right now.
        labels - The new labels the Term will have after the refactoring.

      • refactorInCaseOfNewIdRequired

        protected void refactorInCaseOfNewIdRequired(TermLabelState state,
                                 Goal goal,
                                 Term term,
                                 Services services,
                                 List<TermLabel> labels)
        Refactors in case that the inner most label needs a new ID.
        Parameters:
        state - The TermLabelState of the current rule application.
        goal - The optional Goal on which the Term to create will be used.
        term - The Term which is now refactored.
        services - The Services used by the Proof on which a Rule is applied right now.
        labels - The new labels the Term will have after the refactoring.

      • refactorBewlowUpdates

                         Term term,

        Refactors the Term below its update.
        Parameters:
        applicationPosInOccurrence - The PosInOccurrence in the previous Sequent which defines the Term that is rewritten.
        term - The Term which is now refactored.
        labels - The new labels the Term will have after the refactoring.

      • refactorSequentFormulas

        protected void refactorSequentFormulas(TermLabelState state,
                           Services services,
                           Term term,
                           List<TermLabel> labels)
        Refactors the specified SequentFormulas.
        Parameters:
        state - The TermLabelState of the current rule application.
        services - The Services used by the Proof on which a Rule is applied right now.
        term - The Term which is now refactored.
        labels - The new labels the Term will have after the refactoring.

      • refactorSubstitution

        protected void refactorSubstitution(Term term,
                        Term tacletTerm,
                        List<TermLabel> labels)
        Refactors the given Term after a substitiution.
        Parameters:
        term - The Term to refactor.
        tacletTerm - The taclet Term which provides additional labels to be merged with the other Term.
        labels - The new labels the Term will have after the refactoring.

      • isInnerMostParentRefactored

        public static boolean isInnerMostParentRefactored(TermLabelState state,
                                  Goal goal)
        Checks if the inner most parent was already refactored on the given Goal.
        Parameters:
        state - The TermLabelState to read from.
        goal - The Goal to check.
        Returns:
        true already refactored, false not refactored yet.

      • setInnerMostParentRefactored

        public static void setInnerMostParentRefactored(TermLabelState state,
                                Goal goal,
                                boolean refactored)
        Defines if the inner most parent was already refactored on the given Goal.
        Parameters:
        state - The TermLabelState to read from.
        goal - The Goal to check.
        refactored - true already refactored, false not refactored yet.

      • isUpdateRefactroingRequired

        public static boolean isUpdateRefactroingRequired(TermLabelState state)
        Checks if a refactoring below the updates is required.
        Parameters:
        state - The TermLabelState to read from.
        Returns:
        true refactoring required, false refactoring is not required.

      • setUpdateRefactroingRequired

        public static void setUpdateRefactroingRequired(TermLabelState state,
                                boolean required)
        Defines if a refactoring below the updates is required.
        Parameters:
        state - The TermLabelState to modify.
        required - true refactoring required, false refactoring is not required.

      • isParentRefactroingRequired

        public static boolean isParentRefactroingRequired(TermLabelState state)
        Checks if a refactoring of parents is required.
        Parameters:
        state - The TermLabelState to read from.
        Returns:
        true refactoring required, false refactoring is not required.

      • setParentRefactroingRequired

        public static void setParentRefactroingRequired(TermLabelState state,
                                boolean required)
        Defines if a refactoring of parents is required.
        Parameters:
        state - The TermLabelState to modify.
        required - true refactoring required, false refactoring is not required.

      • containsSequentFormulasToRefactor

        public static boolean containsSequentFormulasToRefactor(TermLabelState state)
        Checks if SequentFormulas to refactor are specified.
        Parameters:
        state - The TermLabelState to read from.
        Returns:
        true at least one SequentFormula needs to be refactored, false refactoring is not required.

      • getSequentFormulasToRefactor

        Returns:
        The SequentFormulas to refactor.
